query: Quick thing while I am rinsing off I remembered the duvet I hung in the bedroom needs a little help drying. Power up dehumidifier 1 in the bedroom 28 minutes from now with power on and fan 50% and 13 minutes after the previous action keep it powered on and lower the fan to 40% so it eases off as the air cools
